prestazioni: 4G93T (1.8L turbocharged inline-4) engine rebuild with forged internals: JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and Tomei 260° duration camshafts with adjustable vernier pulleys for precise valve timing

Forced induction upgrade: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller (targeting 1.2 bar / 17.4 psi on 98 RON fuel)

Fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, Walbro 255 lph in-tank fuel pump, Sard 800cc/min fuel pressure regulator, and a custom-mapped Haltech Elite 1500 ECU with flex-fuel sensor for E85 compatibility
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (RVR-specific bolt-on fenders, side skirts, and rear bumper with integrated diffuser) finished in Mitsubishi Racing Silver (code 740) with custom carbon fiber weave overlay

Custom front bumper lip by Rocket Bunny (RVR-specific design) with integrated LED DRLs and a carbon fiber splitter (35mm overhang for improved aero balance), paired with a Cusco Type RS rear wing (200mm chord, 3° adjustable angle)

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (RVR-specific valving) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs, Cusco 22mm front sway bar (adjustable end-links), and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushings, Whiteline rear subframe bushings)
